sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, '100.5', now()), (2, '4294967296', now()), (3, '-1', now()), (4, '0', now()), (5, 'NaN', now());
SELECT id, toUInt32(value) AS converted_value, created_at FROM test_table WHERE toUInt32(value) >= 100 AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT id, AVG(toUInt32(value)) AS avg_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING avg_value >= 50;
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON toUInt32(t1.value) >= toUInt32(t2.value) GROUP BY t1.id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, toUInt32(NULLIF(value, '')) AS safe_conversion FROM test_table WHERE safe_conversion >= 0;
SELECT id, toUInt32(value) FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY HAVING toUInt32(value) >= 300 OR id IS NULL;
SELECT AVG(toUInt32(value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE toUInt32(value) IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (6, '0xFFFFFFFF', now());
SELECT id, toUInt32('Group_' || id) as derived_id FROM test_table ORDER BY derived_id;
